titlestmt.titleproper: First Unitarian Society of Ithaca (N.Y.) records4590
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Kari Smith et al.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-08-17 18:41:04 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Unitarian Society of Ithaca (N.Y.) records
did.physdesc: Constitutions, board minutes, correspondence, financial records, and other records.
did.abstract: Constitutions, board minutes, correspondence, financial records, and numerous other records of the church.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Constitutions, board minutes, correspondence, financial records, and numerous other records of the church.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Unitarian Church of Ithaca, New York records, #4590. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 14 (donor records) is restricted.

did.unittitle: Friarworks: About Boards and Committees, by R. Fulghum

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prose piece written by Robert L. Fulghum, Executive Director, Pacific Northwest District

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Essay written apropos of: George Lincoln Burr, by Roland H. Bainton" reprinted from ISIS, No. 100, Spring of 1944.

did.unittitle: V.D.'s Stories as Told by Virgil D. Morse - 1861-1937.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound typescript volume, Compiled by Lillian Shaben and Robert V. Morse. Signed, "Presented to the First Unitarian Society of Ithaca, by Robert V. Morse, Dec. 1945"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound volume. "These essays portray my slow attempt to understand the world of history and international politics."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound manuscript volume with Constitution of 1871 and Board Minutes 1903-1913.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound manuscript volume of Board Minutes 1914-1917.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound manuscript volume of Board Minutes Oct-Nov 1917

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, Board Minutes, Reports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Unitarian Service Pension society, Proposed Amendment to Constitution Dec 28, 1928

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: AUA Resolution on Anti-Semitism

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution of impartiality by Morse, R.V. 1947; List of Wills 1946, Excerpts from by-laws of AUA

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: R.E. Program, Excerpts from AUA By-Laws, Proposed union between Universalists and Unitarians, Proposals for democratizing structure of AUA, Displaced persons Committee and interpreters, USC Appeal, AUA Resolutions May 1950

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Heizer Club, Copy of Section 164, Religious Corporations Law June 1951

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposed revision of by-laws Oct 1951, Resolution Nov 5 1951, Constitution as amended to Jan 4 1952, UU Commission on Federal Union Mar 12 1952, Church expansion discussions

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution regarding religion and politics by R.V. Morse Mar 2 1953, Constitution as amended to Apr. 23, 1953

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church expansion committee report, letters regarding radio sermons

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church as emergency hospital Oct 1954Church expansion report Jan 3 1955, Parish list Jan 1955

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Constitution as amended to Apr. 23, 1957

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter re: international assoc. for religious freedom Nov 1957; Letter re: building new church, April 23 1958; Letter re: Parsonage, Apr. 23, 1958; Consideration of Teele House, Apr. 23 1958

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: New Parish house, expansion fund, pulpit committee, statement on merger of Unitarians with Universalists

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Hazel's Backyard

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: China Study Group

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Parlor Project

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tompkins County Day Care

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Grant Proposal to Universalists; New Organ Funding

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Final Report to Universalists re: Program for Developing Contemporary Music; Festival of Music Project

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposal to VEATCH Committee

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Alma Russell Garden

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy of Tax Exemption Letter of 1962; Constitution as Amended May 23, 1978

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: PARKIT

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Sabbatic Leave; Planning and Development Study

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Military Draft Counseling; Church Bond Resolution; Goals Checklist

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bids for Roof work; Drawing of Roof

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Painting Contract 1980; Roof Repairs Contract 1983

did.unittitle: Emergency Evacuation Instructions, Parish House and Church Basement

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Direct-Page Communications Cost Increase Letter, 1980

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports, Contracts and Bids for heating and insulation work, 1980

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Building and Grounds; Building Permits; Maintenance Reports

scopecontent.p: Rental Agreements; Day Care

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Abstract of the Title and Deeds to 407 E. Buffalo St.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Appraisal and Sale of 212 Fall Creek Drive

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Summary Report of 1958 Real Estate Transactions for 407 E. Buffalo; 212 Fall Creek Drive; 306 N. Aurora Street

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Policies for Use and Rental of Church

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports about Church Safety Systems; 1973 proposal from Simplex Time Recorder Co. for Smoke, Heat and Fire Detection Equipment.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In response to thefts at the church, tighter security and more control over building keys was instituted.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Master Copy of Form, "Using the Sound System"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contracts and Bid Proposals for Steeple Repair Work.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bond Resolution, Nov 11 1980; Mortgage Agreement

scopecontent.p: Finance Committee Reports

scopecontent.p: Pledge Campaign

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Treasurer's Books (Bound) 2; Each book contains unbound list of contributing members

scopecontent.p: List of Members and Rules for Committees

scopecontent.p: Photo of Harold Scott

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence and Pending Candidates

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: UUA Unitarian Universalists Ministers Association: Guidelines; Meeting minutes 1970; Profile for New Minister 1970; Candidate statements

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes of January 13, 1981 meeting.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Requests for Volunteers, 1982

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reports on Service for Dec 13, 1970

did.unittitle: Area Congregations Together; Meals on Wheels; Kitchen Cupboard (1982-1983; 1981-1982; 1982-1984)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of Unitarian with notices of activities; Annual program for ACT 1982

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter from Ithaca City Clerk about the Church as a Polling Place in 1980.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Energy Audit Report 1984.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Information and letters concerning establishment of a Draft Counseling center if the US Senate approved a Peacetime Draft.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Explanatory circular on the EOS. Names Hazel Brampton, church member.

did.unittitle: Federation of Churches of Ithaca and Vicinity

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter and copy of the Constitution of the Federation of Churches of Ithaca and Vicinity.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Program for the Ithaca Council of Church Women, World Day of Prayer, Service at Unitarian Church March 8, 1957.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prevent Alcohol Related Killings and Injuries in Tompkins County - circular listing church members.

did.unittitle: Sponsor of Tompco Better Housing Inc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter accepting Unitarian Church as sponsor of the program. Booklets from Tompso B.H. program.

did.unittitle: Vietnamese Refugees - In Town: Names and Needs
Vietnamese Refugees - Families No Longer Requesting Ithaca Sponsorship
Vietnamese Refugees - Welcoming Committee: Members, Minutes, Misc., Housing
Denominational Affairs: College Centers Student Conference and Billings Lecture
History: Alma Russell's Recollections Of Church From 1931. Audio Tape and Transcription.
Applications For Aid From American Unitarian Association (A.U.A.)
History, Description, Constitution and Committees In Booklet Form By Badger, Henry (Pastor)
Ethical Section Of Unity Club Minutes
Our Church History By Muenscher, Minner
Letter From Horace Mack's Granddaughter: Fernow, Lucy Kephart
Facsimile Of Letter By Bellows, Dr.
Map Showing Location Of First Building
Eliot, Samuel A. At Sage Chapel
"How The Foundations Were Laid" By Hosner, Ralph S.
Lists Of Names For Ithaca and Out Of Town
Sponsorship Of Displaced Persons Families In Ithaca. Audio Cassette Tape and Transcription. (Updated 1992)
Outline--Liberal Religious Organization In Tompkins County
New Members - Name Tags, Breakfast, News
Carols and Songs, Music Folio, Miscellaneous Songs
Organizations: Family and Individual Resource Support Team (F.I.R.S.T.) (1979-1980, 1982-1983)

Orders of Service and Unitarian (14 volumes bound)
Women's Alliance: Annual Reports, By-Laws, Minutes
Bazaar Posters (3 On Top Of Folder)
Reports Of Garments Made During World War I
